title: Kids Gardening Set, Grow Your own kit for Children, Wildflower Seeds, Garden Set for Kids, Seed Kits for Kids, Kids Survival kit, Childrens Gardening Set, Kids Activity Pack (Grow Your Own Deluxe)
features: 🌻 ACTIVITY SET INCLUDES: 5 x Packs of seeds – wildflowers seeds, sunflower seeds, cress seeds, pea & bean seeds. 5 x Planting labels/ Wooden Plant markers. 5 x biodegradable plant pots. 5 x Compost Discs. 5 x Activities sheets for kids..
🌻 BEGINNER FRIENDLY INDOOR/ OUTDOOR GARDENING SET FOR CHILDREN. Easy To Use & Grow. No gardening experience necessary, full instructions included! They can be grown all year round if grown indoors!

🌻 A FUN AND EDUCATIONAL GROW KIT. Learn about seed germination and plant growth, the life cycle of a pea, how to make a cress head, label the different parts of a plant and tick the plants and flowers that you have found on your hunt sheet.

🌻 PERFECT ECO FRIENDLY, GARDENER GIFT. Suitable for many occasions such as children’s garden activity, outdoor education. Blooming Marvellous Gift to Keep Your Children Occupied. Keep The Kids Busy! The garden survival kits are also ideal to send to a loved one if they are far away, perfect little pick me up to pass the time.

🌻 Handmade in Oxford. GIVING BACK, OUR COMMITMENT TO CHARITY – A portion of all sales from these gift packs will be donated to the charity Trees For Cities 🌳🌳🌳 This set supports the national curriculum with influence from Forest School, Steiner and Montessori education.Christmas Eve Box, Stocking filler, Christmas gift box, Christmas activity box for kids, Stocking filler, token Gift, Christmas Eve Gift, Christmas Eve box children's, Christmas craft.
description: Product Description A FUN AND EDUCATIONAL GROW KIT Learn about seed germination and plant growth, the life cycle of a pea, how to make a cress head, label the different parts of a plant and tick the plants and flowers that you have found on your hunt sheet. The Activity Packs will help your children engage and connect with nature - helping them learn about and interact with plants and insects. They support the national curriculum. WHO ARE WE? Healthy Family is a small, Oxford -based family business. We believe passionately in looking after our planet and we try and keep our boxes eco by sourcing natural and plastic free materials and packaging where possible and using certified organic and biodynamic seeds. All our packaging is recyclable. Our activity packs are designed and handmade in Oxford in the UK. WHAT’S INSIDE OUR BOX? 5 x packs of seeds – wildflowers, sunflower, bean, cress & pea: 6 sunflower seeds per pack 6 bean seeds per pack approx 100 wildflower seeds per pack approx 100 cress seeds per pack 6 pea seeds per pack. The seeds are sourced from the UK. Seed packets measure 6.7 x 9.8cm 5 x Planting labels/ Wooden Plant markers 5x plant pots 5 x Compost Discs that expands inside it’s own bag. 5 x activities sheets for kids: 5 different activities (label the different parts of a plant, plants and flowers hunt sheet, the life cycle of a pea, plants growth chart and how to make a cress head) Connecting children with nature. Kids love to dig in the dirt and pick the flowers. The Activity Packs will help your children engage and connect with nature - helping them learn about and interact with plants and insects. They support the national curriculum with influence from Forest School, Steiner and Montessori education. To avoid children’s boredom, choose fast growing seeds for kids. The quicker they can see something happen, the more interested they will be in the process. Plants with large or small dimensions create a sense of wonder in children. BEGINNER FRIENDLY INDOOR/ OUTDOOR GARDENING SET FOR CHILDREN. Easy To Use & Grow. No gardening experience necessary, full instructions included! They can be grown all year round if grown indoors! THE PERFECT ECO- FRIENDLY, GARDENER GIFT! Blooming Marvellous Gift to Keep Your Children Occupied. Keep The Kids Busy! Suitable for many occasions such as children’s garden activity, outdoor education. The garden activity kits are also ideal to send to a loved one if they are far away, perfect little pick me up to pass the time.
